title: Pagination loop causing duplicate pages
symptom: The pagination loop starts repeating pages, leading to duplicate records and trapping the workflow in a loop.
root_cause: The pagination loop can lose state during execution due to reasons like cursor resets, old next-page tokens being returned by the API, or rate limiting causing duplicate responses. This results in the workflow cycling through the same pages repeatedly.
fix_steps: Track all used cursors during pagination
Store each cursor that has been used
Implement a check to stop the loop if a cursor is repeated
agent_instruction: Implement cursor tracking to prevent pagination loops.
